name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## Problem This Feature Solves
[Describe the problem this would address. Write it as a user story: "As a [role], I want [capability] so that [benefit]."]

## Proposed Solution
[Describe what you would like to happen. Be specific about the user experience.]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Specific, testable condition 1]
- [ ] [Specific, testable condition 2]
- [ ] [Specific, testable condition 3]

## Alternatives Considered
[Were there other approaches? Why was this one preferred?]

## Additional Context
[Mockups, references, related issues, or other context]
